data.body:
## Description

**What**: Add tests to tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh that verify: (a) default ticket list excludes archived tickets, (b) --include-archived flag returns all tickets including archived ones. Create test fixture with 2 open tickets + 1 archived ticket (ARCHIVE event in tracker).

**Why**: RED phase — these tests define the expected behavior before implementation.

**Note**: ticket-list.sh has no direct-target mode (no <id> argument) — Done Definition 3 (clear error for archived direct target) is NOT applicable to ticket-list.sh. It only applies to ticket deps/link commands.

**Sub-step**: Review all existing test-ticket-list.sh tests and verify none of their fixtures accidentally contain archived tickets that would be affected by the exclusion default.

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh (add test functions)
- .test-index (add RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
Write test_include_archived_flag_returns_all_tickets and test_default_excludes_archived — both fail because --include-archived is not yet recognized.

### Test approach
Create a temporary tracker dir with 3 ticket directories (2 open, 1 with ARCHIVE event), invoke ticket-list.sh via bash, parse JSON output, count tickets. Each test function creates and tears down its own temporary tracker dir.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — excluding RED-marked tests
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test function test_include_archived_flag_returns_all_tickets exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_include_archived_flag_returns_all_tickets' tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh
- [ ] Test function test_default_excludes_archived exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_default_excludes_archived' tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker entry added
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-list.sh.*test-ticket-list.sh.*test_include_archived' .test-index
- [ ] Each test creates its own isolated temp tracker fixture
  Verify: grep -c 'mktemp\|tmp_dir\|TMPDIR' tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
